title: hieracium nericiense
intro: Hieracium nericiense, also known as Mouse Ear Hawkweed, is a perennial flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be beneficial for wound healing and reducing fever. The health benefits of Hieracium nericiense include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce pain, and act as an antiseptic. The herbal preparations of Hieracium nericiense typically involve making teas, infusions, or tinctures from the leaves and flowers of the plant, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and optimal usage.
